title: Laws inconsistent with fundamental rights
text: All existing laws inconsistent with the provisions of this Part shall become void to the extent of such inconsistency.

title: Equality before law
text: All citizens are equal before law and are entitled to equal protection of law.

title: Non-discrimination
text: The State shall not discriminate against any citizen on grounds only of religion, race, caste, sex or place of birth.

title: Equal rights for women
text: Women shall have equal rights with men in all spheres of the State and public life.

title: Equality of opportunity
text: There shall be equality of opportunity for all citizens in respect of employment or office in the service of the Republic.

title: Protection of law
text: To enjoy the protection of the law is the inalienable right of every citizen.

title: Right to life
text: No person shall be deprived of life or personal liberty save in accordance with law.

title: Safeguards as to arrest
text: No person shall be detained in custody without being informed of the grounds for such arrest.

title: Forced labour
text: All forms of forced labour are prohibited and any contravention of this provision shall be an offence punishable in accordance with law.

title: Protection in respect of trial
text: No person shall be convicted of any offence except for violation of a law in force at the time of the commission of the act.

title: Freedom of movement
text: Subject to reasonable restrictions, every citizen shall have the right to move freely throughout Bangladesh.

title: Freedom of assembly
text: Every citizen shall have the right to assemble and participate in public meetings peacefully.

title: Freedom of association
text: Every citizen shall have the right to form associations or unions.

title: Freedom of thought and expression
text: Freedom of thought and conscience is guaranteed, as is freedom of speech and expression.

title: Freedom of profession
text: Every citizen has the right to enter upon any lawful profession or occupation.

title: Freedom of religion
text: Every citizen has the right to profess, practice or propagate any religion.

title: Right to property
text: Every citizen shall have the right to acquire, hold, transfer or otherwise dispose of property.

title: Protection of home
text: Every citizen shall have the right to be secure in his home against entry, search and seizure.

title: Enforcement of fundamental rights
text: The right to move the High Court Division for enforcement of fundamental rights is guaranteed.
